creator: itojun@itojun.org
text:
Hello, this is Jun-ichiro Itoh, one of a committers@FreeBSD.

	Could you review the attached revised port if possible?
	It includes Makefile clarification, pkg/PLIST clarification and
	tiny patch to distribution Makefile. (next time please use
	/usr/ports/devel/portlint before submitting a port, it can check
	and help beautify your port directory)

itojun
